prompt: 댓글 시스템 컴포넌트 만들어줘. 댓글 작성, 수정, 삭제, 대댓글 기능이 있어야 해. 낙관적 업데이트도 적용해줘.
assertions: Response has three sections: Architecture Overview, Code Implementation, Review Points
Types/Schemas, Hooks, and Components are separated into distinct files or clearly labeled sections
No usage of 'any' type in TypeScript code
Each code block includes a file path comment
Uses TanStack Query optimistic update pattern (onMutate/onError/onSettled or optimisticUpdate)
Uses ErrorBoundary or Suspense for declarative error/loading handling
